RentCarOrder.title: Rent Car Order
RentCarOrder.description: An order representing a POS check-out transaction in rent car collection

userEmail.description: Email of the logged in user who placed the order

items.description: JSON string representing list of purchased or rented items to prevent complex nesting check in rules

totalAmount.description: Total checkout price in THB - Thai Baht

paymentMethod.description: Payment option: Cash, Debit card, or QR

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction was completed

rent car/{orderId}.description: The car rental POS orders, including selected food items and packages
